---
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: right
    toc-depth: 4 # Shows up to ### sub-sections
    toc-expand: true
    toc-highlight: true
author: 
  - name: "SVA name "
    affiliations: "Swedish Veterinary Agency"
---

# Antibiotic resistance in animals {#sec-ara}

{{< include Notifiable_diseases.qmd >}}

{{< include Zoonotic_pathogens.qmd >}}

{{< include Clinical_isolates_from_animals.qmd >}}

{{< include Indicator_bacteria_from_animals.qmd >}}
